opsec_defaults.prompt_boundary: Only sanitized records may leave the scraper host or be pasted into an AI prompt.
network_rules: Collect only public sources unless Ayush explicitly approves a separate workflow.
Respect robots.txt and published rate limits for web sources.
Do not bypass login walls, CAPTCHAs, paywalls, or private invites.
Do not collect credential dumps, malware binaries, exploit payloads, or victim target lists.

official_gov_feeds.description: Official US government vulnerability and advisory feeds suitable for direct citation.

public_technical_chatter.description: Public technical discussion indexes, advisory databases, and repository activity used as early exploit-context signals.

public_social_chatter.description: Public social posts and public community threads used only after minimization and deduplication.

high_risk_metadata_only.description: High-risk public or semi-public source families represented only by metadata labels. No endpoints, screenshots, raw text, credentials, or real hidden-service addresses belong in this repo.

osint_context_feeds.description: Public or API-gated context sources used only for broad geopolitical, infrastructure, transport, or exposure context. These are not target-enumeration lanes.

analysis_tooling_references.description: Non-collection tools that may support visualization, simulation, or demo analysis. They are cataloged so agents do not confuse them with scrape targets.

safety.notes: Official CISA feed; raw JSON may be cached for reproducible citation.
Use without an API key at conservative cadence; optional keys must never be added to this catalog.

sources.display_name: FIRST Exploit Prediction Scoring System API

safety.notes: Collect EPSS score metadata only. Do not enrich with exploit writeups or proof-of-concept material.

sources.display_name: U.S. State Department Travel Advisories RSS

safety.notes: Keep title, date, and link only as geopolitical instability context.

options.target_sector: US travelers, embassies, and overseas operations

sources.display_name: U.S. DOJ Cyber-Filtered Press Releases API

safety.notes: Collect DOJ title/date/link metadata only; omit press-release body text.

sources.display_name: Federal Register Sanctions and Export-Control Search API

safety.notes: Use public document metadata only for sanctions/export-control pressure timing.
Aggregate-only CSV collector is implemented. Use for sanctions pressure metadata, not screening or identity export; never retain individual names, addresses, identifiers, or raw rows.

sources.display_name: NOAA NHC Atlantic Tropical Cyclone RSS

safety.notes: Use storm headline/date/link as critical-infrastructure stress context, not as targeting information.

options.display_label: NOAA NHC Atlantic tropical cyclone feed
options.target_sector: US critical infrastructure under weather stress

sources.display_name: NOAA NHC Eastern Pacific Tropical Cyclone RSS

safety.notes: Use storm headline/date/link as Pacific and West Coast infrastructure stress context.

options.display_label: NOAA NHC Eastern Pacific tropical cyclone feed
options.target_sector: Pacific and West Coast critical infrastructure under weather stress

safety.notes: Official advisory pages can support demo citations and timing rationale.
Useful for infrastructure and OT timing forecasts.
Keep summaries and references; do not copy large advisory bodies into prompts.

sources.display_name: ProjectDiscovery Nuclei Templates CVE Commit Metadata

safety.notes: Collect commit metadata only. Do not fetch or store template contents.
Use public thread metadata and minimal excerpts only.
Collect advisory headline/date/link only. Do not fetch proof-of-concept material or customer-specific guidance.

options.target_sector: organizations using Fortinet edge and security products

safety.notes: Collect advisory headline/date/link only; no customer portal content or support-case data.

options.target_sector: organizations using Ivanti edge and enterprise management products

sources.display_name: Microsoft MSRC Security Update Guide CVRF API

safety.notes: Disabled until a period-aware collector exists; cataloged as a safe vendor-advisory lane.

sources.display_name: Reddit Public Security Communities New Posts

safety.notes: Collect public post metadata and titles; avoid full comment trees.
Disabled until a specific instance/tag expansion plan is reviewed. Public hashtag RSS only; hash authors before local storage when possible.
Disabled by default. Telegram collection must run only on the isolated scraper host and emit sanitized summaries without handles or raw posts.
Disabled. Treat as aggregate exposure context only; never export host lists, banners, IPs, or targetable search results.
Disabled until an API-key workflow exists. Use only for summarized public OSINT context and citations.
Cataloged as a reference, not a scrape target. Human approval required before adding any specific tool.
Disabled. Use only aggregate maritime stress or disruption context, never vessel-level tracking.
Disabled. Treat as aggregate maritime context only after terms and auth are reviewed.
Disabled because data dumps are large and movement-level. Use only aggregate, delayed context after human review.
Disabled. Dataset account/licensing review required; do not download bulk movement data into the repo.
Disabled. Treat as broad disruption context only after terms review; never collect flight-level tracking.
Reference-only idea source; not a live intelligence feed.
Visualization reference only. Do not store private map exports or movement-level data in the repo.
Visualization reference only, not a scrape source.
Simulation reference only. Any Stage 3 usage should be explicit and defensive.

sources.display_name: Public Onion Landing Page Metadata Placeholder

safety.notes: Disabled. Onion work is VM-only and metadata-only; never commit hidden-service addresses or raw page content.
Disabled by default. Represents metadata generated on the isolated scraper only; no real endpoint belongs in git.
Use only coarse metadata such as category, timing, count, and sanitized analyst summary.
Manual sanitized JSONL lane for counts and tags only. Raw paste material never enters the repo.
